messages.content: 尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您造成了困扰。现在查看了之前所有的信息。先请您在稳定的wifi环境下进行固件升级。如果仍然存在问题，请您录制一段详细且能看出问题的视频，这样有助于我们后续的售后服务。非常抱歉给您带来不便，也感谢您对我们工作的支持。祝您生活愉快。    基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear customer,

We apologize for any inconvenience caused. We have reviewed all the information provided previously. Firstly, we would like to ask you to perform the firmware upgrade in a stable WiFi environment. If the issue persists, could you please record a detailed video that clearly demonstrates the problem? This would greatly assist us in providing further after-sales service. We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your support for our work. 

Wishing you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，很抱歉给您造成困扰。我们收到反馈，我们给您的包裹被物流所丢失，但请放心，我们给您补发。给您造成不便与麻烦，十分抱歉。为了表达我们的歉意，我们给您退还20美金已做歉意。非常感谢您的支持。祝您生活愉快！      基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear customer,

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused to you. We have received your feedback regarding the lost shipment by the logistics company. However, please rest assured that we will be sending you a replacement package. We deeply apologize for any inconvenience and trouble this may have caused you. To express our apologies, we will also be refunding you $20 as a gesture of goodwill. 

Thank you very much for your support. We wish you a pleasant day!

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，感谢您的反馈。目前我们这边没有单独卖垃圾袋。您可以按照如下尺寸：15*15*5cm 进行购买。感谢您对我们的支持，祝您生活愉快。    基于以上内容写一封英语邮件

Dear customer,

Thank you for your feedback. Currently, we do not sell garbage bags separately. However, you can make a purchase based on the following size: 15*15*5cm. We appreciate your support and wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，
感谢您的反馈。很抱歉给您带来困扰。我们已经检查了您的账户，并发现了您提到的问题。我们将竭尽全力解决这个问题，并确保它不再发生。为了弥补给您带来的不便，我们将为您提供一份免费的优惠券，可在下一次购物时使用。再次感谢您对我们的支持和理解。祝您生活愉快！
尊敬的用户，我们收到您的反馈，我们已经了解您的问题，请您一定给到我们一段视频以及SN码（机器底部可以查看到）。没有以上的信息，我们无法给您进行退换货处理。感谢您的配合，祝您生活愉快。  基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear customer,

Thank you for your feedback. We have noted your issue and would kindly request you to provide us with a video clip along with the SN code (which can be found at the bottom of the machine). Without these details, we are unable to proceed with the return or exchange process. We appreciate your cooperation and wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，我们收到您的反馈并了解了详情。按照我们的售后流程，我们给您退换货处理。请您将设备寄送到如下地址，并先垫付邮费，我们在收到您的设备后给您补发新设备和支付您所垫付的邮费，并请提供邮费的凭证与paypal账号。另外，如果邮费超过30美金，请您留着您的设备，我们会补发新的设备。感谢您的支持与配合，祝您生活愉快     基于以上内容写一封英语邮件

Dear customer,

We have received your feedback and understand the details of your issue. According to our after-sales procedure, we will process a return and exchange for you. Please kindly send the device to the following address, and bear the shipping cost initially. Once we receive your device, we will send you a new one and reimburse you for the shipping cost you paid. Please provide us with the proof of shipping cost and your PayPal account. Furthermore, if the shipping cost exceeds $30, please keep your device, and we will send you a new one instead. Thank you for your support and cooperation.

Best regards,

Dear customer,

We have received your feedback and understand the details of your issue. According to our after-sales procedure, we will process a return and exchange for you. Please kindly send the device to the following address, and bear the shipping cost initially. Once we receive your device, we will send you a new one and reimburse you for the shipping cost you paid. Please provide us with the proof of shipping cost and your PayPal account and tracking numer. Furthermore, if the shipping cost exceeds $30, please keep your device, and we will send you a new one instead.Please keep me informed with tracking number or Possible postage costs.Thank you for your support and cooperation.

Best regards,      请润色

Dear customer,

We have received your feedback and understand the details of your issue. According to our after-sales procedure, we will process a return and exchange for you. Please kindly send the device to the following address and bear the initial shipping cost. Once we receive your device, we will send you a new one and reimburse you for the shipping cost. Please provide us with the proof of shipping cost and your PayPal account. Additionally, please keep me informed with the tracking number or any possible postage costs incurred. 

Thank you for your support and cooperation.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您造成困扰。针对您的问题。我们给您补发猫厕所的底座。请您提供您详细的收货地址（国家，洲/省份，城市，详细地址），邮编，电话号码，以及姓名。感谢您的配合，祝您生活愉快。    基于以上内容 写一封英文邮件

Dear customer,

We apologize for any inconvenience caused. Regarding your issue, we will send you a replacement base for the cat litter box. Please kindly provide us with your detailed shipping address (country, state/province, city, detailed address), postal code, phone number, and full name. Thank you for your cooperation and we wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,

12:12您好，根据您反馈的摄像头图像不清晰问题，可以按照如下步骤排查一下，谢谢。
1、确认摄像头镜片的保护膜是否有撕掉；
2、确认是否因为网络不好，自动切换成了标清格式导致，可以人为固定在高清模式，但可能会造成图像卡顿；
3、确认是都光线原因，需要避免云台摄像头对着窗户，这样会产生大逆光影响成像效果；
4、确认是都因为IR CUT切换异常导致，可以人为切换一下夜视再切换回自动模式；
以上步骤排查完看是否可以解决，如果还是一样现象，帮忙提供一下视频，我们会安排技术人员对接售后处理，谢谢。                        根据以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Hello,

Thank you for your feedback regarding the issue of unclear camera images. To troubleshoot the problem, please follow these steps:

1. Make sure to remove any protective film covering the camera lens.
2. Check if the camera automatically switches to standard definition due to poor network quality. You can manually set it to high definition, but this may result in image lag.
3. Ensure that the camera is not facing a window, as it can cause strong backlighting that affects the image quality.
4. Verify if the issue is related to abnormal IR cut switching. You can manually switch to night vision mode and then switch back to automatic mode.

After completing these steps, please check if the issue is resolved. If the problem persists, kindly provide us with a video recording for further assistance. Our technical team will be happy to help with the after-sales support.

Thank you.

Best regards,

Dear Customer，
We have received your problem. We apologize for the inconvenience you are experiencing 

To assist you further, please follow the steps below:
Please check: 
1. Please confirm whether the Wi-Fi password is entered correctly.
2. The cable is not plugged in or the cable is damaged, you can check by whether the light is displayed normally.
3. Please confirm whether the device is connected to 2.4G Network.
4. Please confirm whether the router is powered on. There will be an indicator light after it is powered on.(Currently, we do not support Wi-Fi which requires special authentication, such as hotels, 
If it is still not working,can you describe your problem in detail? If you could record some videos, that would be easy for us to verify the issue.
Also please provide the below information for better locating the problems.
1. Which channel you bought the product: (Website or Amazon)
2. What is your order number: 
3. What is your SN number: (Locate at the bottom of the litter box downside)
4. What is your device ID: (In the HHOLOVE APP)
5.Time of occurrence of the problem



Thank you for your cooperation, and we look forward to resolving your issue promptly.

Best regards,                                      请润色以上邮件

Dear Customer,

Thank you for bringing the issue to our attention. We apologize for the inconvenience you are experiencing. 

To assist you further, please follow the steps below:

1. Please confirm whether the Wi-Fi password has been entered correctly.
2. Check if the cable is securely plugged in and undamaged. You can verify this by checking if the corresponding indicator light is displayed.
3. Ensure that the device is connected to a 2.4G Network.
4. Make sure that the router is powered on and functioning correctly. You should see an indicator light after it is powered on. Please note that our current system does not support Wi-Fi networks that require special authentication, such as those found in hotels.

If the issue persists, could you please provide more details about the problem you are experiencing? Additionally, recording a video would greatly assist us in troubleshooting the issue.

Moreover, please provide us with the following information to better locate the problem:

1. Channel of purchase: (Website or Amazon)
2. Order number:
3. SN number: (Located at the bottom of the litter box)
4. Device ID: (In the HHOLOVE APP)
5. Time when the problem occurred

Thank you for your cooperation, and we assure you that we will make every effort to promptly resolve your issue.

Best regards,

Dear Customer，
Sorry for the inconvenience.
Firstly, For your problem，because there exists a delay in our product in order to protect your cats, it may appear wrong identification of a cat nearby, then pls unplug the power cord and restart it. It is recommended you to wait for about 5-10 minutes. 
Secondly, pls make sure you were pressing the button correctly. 1) Press the button once is shoveling , tape the button twice is dumping cat litter. 
If the issue persists, could you please provide more details about the problem you are experiencing? Additionally, recording a video would greatly assist us in troubleshooting the issue.

Moreover, please provide us with the following information to better locate the problem:

1. Channel of purchase: (Website or Amazon)
2. Order number:
3. SN number: (Located at the bottom of the litter box)
4. Device ID: (In the HHOLOVE APP)
5. Time when the problem occurred

Thank you for your cooperation, and we assure you that we will make every effort to promptly resolve your issue.
润色上面的邮件

Dear Customer,

We apologize for the inconvenience caused.

Firstly, for the issue you are experiencing, please try unplugging the power cord and restarting the product. Due to the delay feature designed to protect your cats, it may sometimes result in incorrect identification of a nearby cat. We recommend waiting for approximately 5-10 minutes before attempting to use the product again.

Secondly, please ensure that you are pressing the button correctly. Pressing the button once activates the shoveling function, while tapping the button twice activates the dumping of cat litter.

If the issue persists, could you please provide more details about the problem you are experiencing? Additionally, recording a video would greatly assist us in troubleshooting the issue.

Moreover, please provide us with the following information to better locate the problem:

1. Channel of purchase: (Website or Amazon)
2. Order number:
3. SN number: (Located at the bottom of the litter box)
4. Device ID: (In the HHOLOVE APP)
5. Time when the problem occurred

Thank you for your cooperation, and we assure you that we will make every effort to promptly resolve your issue.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，我们收到您的反馈，感谢您的反馈。O-Sitter 使用电池模式时候，为了节约电量，会停止使用其他功能，但仍然会自动出粮。如果有其他问题，请您随时与我们联系，非常感谢您对我们的支持，祝您生活愉快     就以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear Customer,

Thank you for your feedback. We appreciate your input. When using the battery mode with O-Sitter, certain features are disabled to conserve power. However, the automatic feeding function will still operate as intended. 

If you have any further questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. We sincerely appreciate your support. Wishing you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，感谢您的反馈。目前，我们的O-SITTER可以设置每日出粮的份数，但是每份出量的克数是无法设置的。感谢您对我们的关心与支持。祝您生活愉快     就以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear customer,

Thank you for your feedback. Currently, our O-SITTER allows you to set the number of feedings per day, but the exact gram amount per portion cannot be adjusted. We appreciate your concern and support.

Wishing you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的顾客，我们已经收到您的反馈。目前，我已将您的问题以及提供的信息反馈给我们的工程师，请您再耐心等待。一有相关的信息，我将反馈给您。给您造成不便，我深表歉意。祝您生活愉快。    基于以上的内容个，写一封英语邮件、

Dear customer,

Thank you for your feedback. We have received your issue and the provided information, and we have forwarded them to our engineers. Kindly bear with us as we investigate the matter further. As soon as we have any updates, we will promptly inform you. We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Wishing you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，我们收到了您的反馈。我们在大量用户实际操作中，发现该温度的显示存在的意义不大，在后续的版本迭代中会撤销该温度的显示。感谢您对我们产品的支持与关注。祝您生活愉快。           基于以上内容，写一封英语邮件

Dear customer,

Thank you for your feedback. We have received your concerns regarding the temperature display feature. Based on extensive user feedback and analysis, we have determined that this feature has limited significance. Therefore, in future software updates, we will be removing the temperature display. We appreciate your support and interest in our product.

Wishing you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，感谢您积极的参与。下周我们会邀请您加入WhatsApp的群。再次感谢您对我们的支持    基于以上内容写一封英语邮件

Dear customer,

Thank you for your active participation. We would like to invite you to join our WhatsApp group next week. We truly appreciate your support.

Best regards,
